name: @nightingale-elements/nightingale-msa

en.when_to_use: Use it for comparative genomics or protein-family views: a multiple sequence alignment (MSA) panel, conservation, and sequence-logo views. Provide aligned sequences of equal length with '-' for gaps as el.data=[{name,sequence}]. Use it instead of a static colored table when the alignment grows or needs conservation/logo views. Note: color-scheme='conservation' or overlay-conservation starts an inline Blob web worker; strict CSP must allow worker-src blob:, otherwise avoid that color scheme.
en.why_valuable: A multiple sequence alignment (MSA) viewer for thousands of aligned residues, with conservation/consensus coloring, a sequence logo, overview thumbnail, synchronized coordinate labels, and canvas virtualization for large alignments. Native AI can fake a small colored letter grid but fails at real alignment scale, color schemes, gap handling, and logo rendering.

data_in.note: This is a custom element; the consumer calls customElements.define('nightingale-msa', NightingaleMSA) with a duplicate-definition guard. Assign data to el.data as SequencesMSA = Array<{name, sequence}>. Sequences should be aligned to equal lengths, with '-' for gaps. Pass color-scheme, label-width, tile-height, and similar options as kebab-case attributes.

sequences.name: string -- sequence label
sequences.sequence: string -- aligned residues of equal length, using '-' for gaps

schema.width?: number -- pixel-width attribute; defaults to about 600
schema.height?: number -- pixel-height attribute; defaults to about 200
schema.color-scheme?: string -- defaults to 'clustal2'; examples include clustal, zappo, taylor, hydro, nucleotide, conservation...
schema.tileHeight?: number -- tile-height attribute, height per base; defaults to 20

spec.note: Provide width/height as px attributes. Do not use vh.

when_to_use: 比较基因组学/蛋白家族图:多序列比对(MSA)面板、保守性与 sequence-logo 视图。喂已比对的序列(等长、gap 用 '-'),赋给 el.data=[{name,sequence}]。比对变大或需保守性/logo 时替代静态彩色表。注意:color-scheme='conservation' 或 overlay-conservation 会起一个内联 Blob web worker——严格 CSP 需放行 worker-src blob:,否则避开该配色。
why_valuable: 多序列比对(MSA)查看器:数千条已比对残基,带保守性/consensus 着色、sequence logo、overview 缩略图与同步坐标标签,对大比对做虚拟化(canvas)。原生 AI 能伪造小的彩色字母网格,但在真实比对规模、着色方案、gap 处理与 logo 渲染上会崩。

data_in.note: custom element,消费方 customElements.define('nightingale-msa', NightingaleMSA)(guard 防重)。数据赋给 el.data,类型 SequencesMSA = Array<{name, sequence}>,序列应等长(已比对,gap 用 '-')。color-scheme、label-width、tile-height 等以属性给(kebab-case)。

sequences.name: string —— 序列标签
sequences.sequence: string —— 已比对残基(等长,gap 用 '-')

schema.width?: number —— 属性,像素宽,默认约 600
schema.height?: number —— 属性,像素高,默认约 200
schema.labelWidth?: number —— 属性 label-width,0=不显示标签
schema.tileHeight?: number —— 属性 tile-height,单碱基高,默认 20

example._why: data 是 [{name,sequence}] 且序列须等长,minimal 钉死字段名与等长约束。

uplink: display/local-interact 默认不上行;残基 hover/选择与 highlight 由消费 AI 接组件原生事件处理。

carriers.widget: supported:自包含 Lit web component,自身 shadow 样式,零 head/body 足迹;color-scheme='conservation' 需 CSP 放行 worker-src blob:

isolation.evidence: +esm default export = NightingaleMSA (va). dist/nightingale-msa.d.ts: `set data(sequences: SequencesMSA)`; SequencesMSA = Array<{name:string, sequence:string}> (dist/types/types.d.ts) — schema pins el.data=[{name,sequence}]. README attributes: width/height, color-scheme(default 'clustal2'; clustal/zappo/taylor/hydro/nucleotide/conservation/...), label-width(default 0), tile-height(default 20); mixins withPosition/withDimensions add length/display-start/display-end. Package does NOT self-register 'nightingale-msa' with a literal (grep found no customElements.define("nightingale-msa")); consumer registers (guarded). Self-contained Lit element: grep +esm attachShadow x1, adoptedStyleSheets x2 into own shadow; zero document.head, zero document.body. globalStyleInjection=no, globalDomMutation=no, globalEvents=no. CSP caveat: color-scheme 'conservation'/overlay-conservation spins an inline worker (grep new Worker x1 + Blob( x1) → needs worker-src blob:. Two internal customElements.define (variable tag) register helper elements. License MIT — inherited from the monorepo LICENSE (github.com/ebi-webcomponents/nightingale, EMBL-EBI 2023); the published package.json omits the license field. shadowCompatible=yes (conditional only on the Blob worker for the conservation scheme). Deps @nightingale-elements/nightingale-new-core, d3.
